name: Ginger-Rhubarb Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh or frozen rhubarb (cut into 1-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
This sauce pairs well with roast duck or pork.
1. Place the rhubarb and orange juice in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add half of the zest to the pan and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the sugar and continue cooking for another 15 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and allow the mixture to cool slightly.
5. Before serving, stir in the remaining orange zest.
6. The sauce can be stored refrigerated for several days or frozen for later use.
